hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: Your cards — 4, K. Your opponent raised before the cards were dealt. You called.
River — 9. Your opponent fired a large river bet.

wrongReasons: K 4 plays similarly, but the correct hand pairs a specific board card that K 4 doesn't. Look at which hole card ranks actually appear on the board.
With only high card, 5 J wouldn't commit chips across multiple streets. This betting line requires a genuinely made hand from the flop onward.
With only high card, 8 3 wouldn't commit chips across multiple streets. This betting line requires a genuinely made hand from the flop onward.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 7 4

Your opponent flopped two pair and bet all three streets with growing sizing. The consistent pressure — especially the larger turn bet — signals a hand strong enough to protect but not quite a monster.
